title: Restore Accidental Working Tree Edits
description: You accidentally edited tracked code in `app.js` and now need to discard those local edits. Restore the file back to the exact committed state without creating any new commits.
objective: The file `app.js` must match the current `HEAD` version exactly. No new commits may be created. The working tree must be clean.
hints: `git status` shows tracked files with local edits.
`git restore app.js` discards unstaged edits in that file.
Older syntax also works: `git checkout -- app.js`.
